name: Kobold Castle
short_description: Kobold Castle is a 2D arena survival game that takes place on the wall of a besieged castle. As one of 4 kobold defenders, you must hold the line against dangerous waves of attackers, collect upgrades and powerups, and defeat a variety of enemies and bosses. Try to survive as long as you can!
detailed_description: Kobold Castle, is a 2D arena survival game that takes place on one of the walls of a besieged castle.  Playing as one of 4 lone kobold defenders, you must hold the line against progressively more dangerous waves of attackers, collect upgrades and powerups, and defeat a variety of enemies and bosses.  Try to survive as long as you can before you are overwhelmed!
about_the_game: Kobold Castle, is a 2D arena survival game that takes place on one of the walls of a besieged castle.  Playing as one of 4 lone kobold defenders, you must hold the line against progressively more dangerous waves of attackers, collect upgrades and powerups, and defeat a variety of enemies and bosses.  Try to survive as long as you can before you are overwhelmed!
